title: Palo Alto Networks - Automatic SLR (Community)
content:
Initial default playbook to run the Palo Alto Networks Automatic SLR (Community) Integration

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Matt Smith pack (PaloAltoNetworksAutomaticSLR_Community, community-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: Palo Alto Networks Automatic SLR (Community).

fromversion: "5.0.0"

  (Community) Integration

      version: -1
      name: Initiate stats_dump.tar.gz generation

      script: Palo Alto Networks Automatic SLR (Community)|||autoslr-ngfw-generate

      iscommand: true
      brand: Palo Alto Networks Automatic SLR (Community)
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':

    separatecontext: false
    view: |-

        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 370
        }
      }

    skipunavailable: false

    task:

      name: Check generation job status

      iscommand: true
      brand: Palo Alto Networks Automatic SLR (Community)
